findings.description: Hyperlink lost on 'Division's website' in Question 19 answer. The PDF shows this as a clickable hyperlink but the HTML renders it as plain text with no <a> tag.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 5 Q19 answer: 'Resolution templates are available on the Division's website.' where 'Division's website' is a hyperlink. HTML: '

...Resolution templates are available on the Division's website.

' — no tag.

findings.description: Footnote hyperlink lost for 'Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)'. The PDF shows this footnote text as a clickable hyperlink, but the HTML renders it as plain text.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 4 footnote: '1 Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' is a hyperlink. HTML: '

1 Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)

' — no tag wrapping the text.
